phrases.en: I rolled out the mat on the bedroom floor.
phrases.zh: 我把垫子铺在卧室的地板上。

phrases.en: I dimmed the lights and took a slow, deep breath.
phrases.zh: 我把灯光调暗，缓缓地深吸了一口气。

phrases.en: I reached both arms high above my head.
phrases.zh: 我把双臂高高地举过头顶。

phrases.en: I gently rolled my shoulders backward a few times.
phrases.zh: 我轻轻地把肩膀向后转动了几次。

phrases.en: I slowly tilted my neck toward each side.
phrases.zh: 我把脖子缓缓地向两侧倾斜。

phrases.en: I bent forward and let my hands hang toward the floor.
phrases.zh: 我向前弯下身，让双手垂向地板。

phrases.en: I sat down and stretched my legs out in front of me.
phrases.zh: 我坐了下来，把双腿伸直在身前。

phrases.en: I leaned over carefully and touched my toes.
phrases.zh: 我小心地俯下身，碰到了脚趾。

phrases.en: I twisted my back softly to the left and the right.
phrases.zh: 我轻柔地把后背向左右两侧扭转。

phrases.en: I lay back and pulled one knee toward my chest.
phrases.zh: 我躺了下来，把一侧膝盖拉向胸口。

phrases.en: I relaxed every muscle and breathed out quietly.
phrases.zh: 我放松了每一块肌肉，安静地呼出一口气。

phrases.en: I rolled up the mat and felt completely calm.
phrases.zh: 我把垫子卷起来，感到无比平静。
